description_long: This object is an open book with two visible pages, lying flat and spread out. The pages are blank and appear to be made of standard paper, with a subtle crease running down the center where the spine would be. The book's cover is not distinctly visible, suggesting a minimalistic or plain design. The edges of the pages are straight and the corners are slightly rounded, typical of a standard paperback or hardcover book. The overall color is a uniform light gray or white, with no visible text, illustrations, or decorative elements. The book appears to be of average thickness, suitable for reading or writing.
description: A plain, open book with blank pages and a light gray or white appearance, showing no visible text or illustrations.
description_view_0: Front view of an open book, displaying both blank pages and the central crease.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thickness of the book and the layered pages, with the book lying flat.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open pages and central crease from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the book's thickness and the flat, open position.
